author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: auth_jwt_rsa_hmac_confusion
summary: Re-runs the RS256/HS256 JWT key-confusion attack: fetches the server's public key, HMAC-signs a forged token with it, and checks whether the verifier accepts the result.

args.--url: Target origin URL (probe sweeps common public-key + whoami paths)
